name: Duna (Danube)
notes: Main river on western boundary; high flood risk in spring

name: Tisza
notes: Eastern boundary river; extreme flood risk; heavily regulated

name: Kiskunsági Főcsatorna
notes: Central irrigation canal; frequently runs low in summer droughts

name: Duna–Tisza-közi Hátság Canal
notes: Groundwater-fed canal; critically low in dry years

name: Fehér-tó (Fehértó)
notes: Shallow saline lake; drying trend over past decade; Ramsar site

name: Kondor-tó
notes: Small steppe lake; seasonal; partially dry in late summer

name: Keleti Főcsatorna branch
notes: Eastern distribution canal; moderate and balanced risk profile

name: Ágasegyházi Tározó
notes: Managed retention reservoir; overflow risk during heavy spring rain

name: Kolon-tó
notes: Reed-marsh lake near Izsák; wetland habitat; moderate flood potential

name: Alpári-Holt-Tisza
notes: Oxbow lake; fills rapidly when Tisza floods; harvestable surplus water

name: Kiskőrösi Tározó
notes: Small agricultural reservoir; used for supplementary irrigation

name: Bócsai Belvízcsatorna
notes: Inland waterway canal; collects excess rainwater; flood risk in wet season
